summary: package eu.kalafatic.utils.xml; import org.eclipse.jface.text.BadLocationException; import org.eclipse.jface.text.IDocument; import org.eclipse.jface.text.ITextDoubleClickStrategy; import org.eclipse.jface.text.ITextViewer; public class XMLDoubleClickStrategy implements ITextDoubleClickStrategy { protected ITextViewer fText; @Override public void doubleClicked(ITextViewer part) { int pos = part.getSelectedRange().x; if (pos < 0) { return; } fText = part; if (!selectComment(pos)) { selectWord(pos); } }
